name: Salmon Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 small can red salmon, do not drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cooking oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion, celery, and green pepper to the pot. Sauté until the vegetables are soft and fragrant.
3. Add the chopped potatoes and 1 cup of water to the pot. Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for about an hour until the potatoes are tender.
5. Remove all skin and bones from the salmon and add it to the pot along with its juice.
6. Add 1 cup of milk and 1 cup of cream to the pot. Stir gently.
7. Simmer the chowder on low heat for another hour, stirring occasionally.
8. Add the butter to the pot and stir until melted and well combined.
9. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot, garnished with paprika for added color.
